---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Supply Chain Sentinel.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

Example: "When scanning large monorepos, there is no way to ..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario in which this feature would be used. Who benefits from it and how?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, references, or links to related issues or discussions.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] I have reviewed the project roadmap and documentation.
